sites.name: CGPA Calculator · Bangladesh
sites.tagline: Offline CGPA tool for Bangladesh honours students.
sites.description: Browser-only, offline-first PWA to calculate GPA and CGPA for Bangladesh honours-level programmes. Works without internet, installable on mobile and desktop.

sites.name: Electricity Calculator
sites.tagline: Estimate your monthly electricity usage & units, device by device.
sites.description: Private, offline-friendly electricity usage calculator. Search, select or add any device and its wattage, set daily hours (with variable usage spans), and see your monthly kWh/units instantly. Save history and export a PDF report. English & বাংলা.
